query:
SELECT name, strain, category, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM products 
GROUP BY name, strain, category 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT name, strain, category, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM products 
GROUP BY name, strain, category 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY count DESC;
